overview: A premium luxury tech gadgets ecommerce website with cinematic animations, glassmorphism UI, and ultra-modern design inspired by Apple, Samsung, Tesla, and Nothing.
features: Cinematic hero section with floating product showcase and spotlight effects
Unique add-to-cart animation with product fly-to-cart and ripple feedback
Glassmorphism product cards with cursor-responsive hover reflections
Premium horizontal product slider with auto-scroll
Animated stats counter with scroll-triggered counting
Luxury testimonial cards with glass effects
Futuristic FAQ accordion with expanding glass panels
Floating particles and layered gradient backgrounds
Champagne gold accent palette on deep matte black and titanium base
